response:
{
  "severity": "critical",
  "component": "Checkout Page (checkout.bundle.js)",
  "summary": "Checkout page shows spinner then white screen when attempting to pay on Chrome 121/Windows 11.",
  "steps_to_reproduce": [
    "Open the site on Chrome 121 on Windows 11.",
    "Add items to the cart.",
    "Navigate to the checkout page.",
    "Enter credit card information.",
    "Click the \"Pay\" button."
  ],
  "expected_behavior": "Payment should be processed and an order confirmation should be displayed.",
  "actual_behavior": "A spinner appears for about 30 seconds, then the page turns white with no error message; console logs a CORS error and \"undefined is not a function\" at checkout.bundle.js:847.",
  "environment": {
    "os": "Windows 11",
    "browser": "Chrome 121"
  }
}
